betterquesting:10.desc:8:
§6Combinator Funnel§f

§aA cheap unpowered alternative to the ACT for crafting same-item patterns!§f

§bThe Combinator Funnel§f is a machine that acts as a cheap, unpowered substitute for the Automatic Crafting Table. It only works for §e2×2§f or §e3×3§f recipes using the same item (e.g., 9 small powders → 1 full-size powder).

§6Usage§f:
§b• Toggle button§f in UI selects 2×2, 3×3, or both patterns
§b• Input slot§f on top
§b• Output slot§f on bottom
§b• No power§f required — completely passive

§6Common Uses§f:
§b• §ePowder Compacting§f — 9 small powders → 1 full powder
§b• §eMaterial Condensing§f — nuggets → ingots, ingots → blocks

§eTip§f: The Combinator Funnel is ideal for early automation of powder compacting before you have power infrastructure. Use it alongside hoppers for a fully passive processing line!
